projectDescription: An MCP server providing web search, news search, and Twitter/X search through xAI's Grok API with rich analysis features including timelines, direct quotes, and multiple perspectives.
keyFeatures: Web search using Grok's AI-powered search capabilities
News search with timeline analysis and comprehensive context
Twitter/X search with sentiment analysis and social media insights
Basic and comprehensive analysis modes for different use cases
Date range filtering for time-specific searches
Automatic retry logic with exponential backoff
Enhanced error handling with detailed feedback
publicApiSurface: grok_search - General search with configurable types and analysis modes
grok_news_search - Search recent news with timeline analysis
grok_twitter - Search Twitter/X posts with optional handle filtering
health_check - Check server health and API connectivity
